name: ExtensionQuestionnaire_Item_AnswerConstraint
title: R5: optionsOnly | optionsOrType | optionsOrString (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Questionnaire.item.answerConstraint` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Questionnaire.item.answerConstraint` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Questionnaire.item.answerConstraint` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Questionnaire.item.answerConstraint` has a context of Questionnaire.item based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Questionnaire`.
Element `Questionnaire.item.answerConstraint` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Questionnaire.item.answerConstraint` has a context of Questionnaire.item based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Questionnaire`.
Element `Questionnaire.item.answerConstraint` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: For items that have a defined set of allowed answers (via answerOption or answerValueSet), indicates whether values *other* than those specified can be selected.

binding.description: Indicates differnt modes for restricting values when options or valueset are specified
